title: Preserve public contract and authority boundaries
description: Keep INSIGHTS versioned, channel-neutral, mutation-free toward upstream modules, and dependent only on released BUDGET/LEDGER producer contracts while exposing one stable consumer contract to agents and CHANNELS.
target: 100% of Public INSIGHTS Operations publish deterministic versioned request, result, error, exit, mutability, authority, idempotency, policy, limit, and compatibility metadata; zero private BUDGET/LEDGER storage, handler, repository, or duplicated Budget Position references; every unsupported producer, INSIGHTS, or CHANNELS pairing fails before financial output or retained-state change.
load_condition: Every public operation and every supported, one-version-older, one-version-newer, malformed, authority-expanded, and missing-capability producer or consumer pairing.
measurement: Schema and policy snapshots, compatibility matrices, dependency-boundary compilation tests, forbidden-reference scans, authority-set comparisons, concurrent-correction producer contract tests, and Agent Host/CHANNELS consumer parity tests.
rationale: The module boundary fails if downstream design bypasses authoritative producers or lets a future channel redefine analytics.
